fields.title: Brief task title
fields.context: Current state and what's been done

rules: Don't add single-session tasks (those go in today.md)
Don't add high-level goals (those go in goals.md)
Remind user about tasks stale >14 days

tasks.title: Charades code cleanup pass
tasks.context: Navigation dead code was cleared earlier, and the latest session delivered a broad Charades polish pass: menu/setup now support 16 players, runtime round-order was rebuilt for larger groups, verdict/timeout flow was hardened, summary/results ranking got tie-aware ordering with a total-guess-time tiebreaker, and summary/results UI was reworked for larger player counts. Remaining cleanup is now narrower: dead presenter/runtime leftovers after the recent feature work, oversized runtime/results files, and an honest browser validation pass for the end-of-round flow after the ranking/time UI changes.
tasks.next_action: Run a visible browser pass for Charades `timer -> verdict -> round summary -> results`, then remove dead presenter/runtime leftovers and split only the still-mixed oversized runtime/results files.

tasks.title: Codenames pool manager polish and browser validation
tasks.context: Persistent non-repeating words are implemented for Tajniacy with per-category history, active-pool blocking below 25 fresh words, shared pool-manager modal reuse, and per-category resets from the setup modal. Code-level checks and package builds pass. The remaining work is UX polish in the modal/setup flow and a deliberate browser verification pass for the exhausted-pool flow.
tasks.next_action: Run a visible browser pass on the Tajniacy setup modal and pool manager, then polish remaining copy/layout issues discovered there.
tasks.blocker: Existing Tajniacy e2e/setup-opening issue: after clicking `Zagraj teraz`, Playwright does not reliably see the setup dialog, which blocks stable browser verification in the current automated flow.
